metadata.description: Claude Code skills for investors evaluating early-stage startup companies

plugins.name: tekton-company-evaluator
plugins.description: Adds a /company-evaluator skill for evaluating early-stage startup companies

plugins.name: draft-pmkt
plugins.description: Adds a /draft-pmkt skill that drafts a PMKT document derived from an investment memo document that evaluates: Product, Market, Competition, Capital intensity, Valuation, Syndicate, Team, following the template found in assets
